message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 12
skinparam classFontName Arial
skinparam classFontSize 14
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor #333333
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E8E8E8
skinparam classHeaderFontColor #000000
skinparam classHeaderFontSize 16
skinparam classHeaderFontStyle bold
skinparam classAttributeFontColor #000000
skinparam classMethodFontColor #000000
skinparam classAttributeIconColor #FF0000
skinparam classMethodIconColor #008000
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 12
skinparam classMethodIconSize 12
skinparam classAttributeIconPosition left
skinparam classMethodIconPosition left
skinparam classAttributeIconStyle square
skinparam classMethodIconStyle circle
skinparam classAttributeIconColor #FF0000
skinparam classMethodIconColor #008000
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 12
skinparam classMethodIconSize 12
skinparam classAttributeIconPosition left
skinparam classMethodIconPosition left
skinparam classAttributeIconStyle square
skinparam classMethodIconStyle circle

class IPreference {
}

class ScalarPreference {
  + «readonly» provider : IPreferenceProvider
  + DataType : PreferenceDataType «get»
  + Visible : bool «get» = true
  + HasDefaultValue : bool «get»
  + HasValueSet : bool «get»
  + Complete : bool «get»
  + Name : string «get»
  + Value : T «get» «set»
  + ValueType : Type «get»
  + ScalarPreference(preferences:IPreferenceProvider, name:string, value:T)
  + ToView() : string
  + FromView(line:string) : void
  + ToggleVisibility() : ScalarPreference<T>
  + UpdateDataType(dataType:PreferenceDataType) : ScalarPreference<T>
  + TryParseValue(input:string, result:TTo) : bool
}

IPreference <|-- ScalarPreference

note right of ScalarPreference
  T
end note

@enduml
